description: Christmas Connect the Dots | Fun! Fun! Fun! Entertaining and educational Christmas dot-to-dot puzzle book. Improve number skills and hand-eye coordination while revealing hidden pictures with holiday and winter themes. Includes a large variety of designs including Santa Claus, Christmas trees, ornaments, snowmen, presents, angels, and lots more. This connect the dots puzzle book is for ages 4-8, ages 8-12, and for adults who enjoy connect the dots puzzles. Read more
